Name: British Tutors Hong Kong
Tagline: Award-Winning Home Tuition and Education Consultancy
About: Founded in 2008, British Tutors is an award-winning private tuition and education consultancy company. We arrange lessons with top tutors in Hong Kong and Singapore, offering academic support in a wide range of subjects.
Philosophy: For some courses, you’ll be required to sit an admissions test, which the university use to assess your academic potential and suitability for the course.
Outcomes: British Tutors Hong Kong has successfully guided numerous students in securing placements at prestigious universities such as Oxford and Cambridge. Many students have also excelled in international exams like the IB and IGCSE, achieving top scores.
Admissions: We are Asia’s experts in preparing students to apply for Oxford and Cambridge Universities. The application is a multi-step process and our team of Oxbridge graduate tutors and advisors can help you with every step of the journey.
Quote: British Tutors act as teachers and, more importantly, mentors for our children.

Performance.Coaching Credentials: British Tutors Hong Kong employs Oxbridge graduates and certified educators with extensive international teaching experience. Tutors hold advanced degrees and are trained in delivering tailored educational support for IB, IGCSE, and A-Level curricula.
Performance.Student Wellbeing: British Tutors Hong Kong prioritizes student wellbeing through personalized mentoring and access to pastoral care services. Regular workshops focus on stress management and building resilience, supporting students' emotional health in a competitive academic environment.
Performance.Academic Integration: British Tutors Hong Kong offers specialized tuition in IB, IGCSE, and A-Level subjects, employing a student-centered approach. Tutors integrate critical thinking and problem-solving skills into lessons, aligning with Hong Kong's rigorous academic standards.
Performance.Competitive Pathway: Graduates from British Tutors Hong Kong have a strong track record of securing places at top universities, including Oxford and Cambridge. Students consistently achieve high scores in international exams like the IB and IGCSE.
Performance.Facilities & Resources: British Tutors Hong Kong provides a conducive learning environment with state-of-the-art educational resources. Facilities include modern classrooms equipped with interactive technology to enhance the tutoring experience.
Performance.Ongoing Accountability: Student progress at British Tutors Hong Kong is closely monitored through regular assessments and detailed feedback reports. Parents receive consistent updates, ensuring transparency and alignment with educational goals.
